languages.text: За последующие столетия мощные археотеховые орудия сменятся турелями малого калибра и украшениями.

traits.locale_text: За последующие столетия мощные археотеховые орудия сменятся турелями малого калибра и украшениями.

languages.text: Over the centuries that followed, this powerful archeotech artillery was replaced by small-calibre turrets and ornaments.
languages.original_text: За последующие столетия мощные археотеховые орудия сменятся турелями малого калибра и украшениями.

traits.locale_text: Over the following centuries, this powerful archeotech artillery will be replaced by small-calibre turrets and ornaments.
Over the centuries that followed, this powerful archeotech artillery was replaced by small-calibre turrets and ornaments.
Over the following centuries, these powerful archeotech artillery will be replaced by small-calibre turrets and ornaments.
Over the following centuries, this powerful archeotech artillery will be replaced by small-calibre turrets and ornaments.
Over the centuries that followed, this powerful archeotech artillery was replaced by small-calibre turrets and ornaments.
Over the centuries that followed, this powerful archeotech artillery was replaced by small-calibre turrets and ornaments.

languages.text: Im Laufe der folgenden Jahrhunderte wurde diese effiziente Archäotech-Artillerie durch kleinkalibrige Geschütze und Ornamente ersetzt.
languages.original_text: Over the centuries that followed, this powerful archeotech artillery was replaced by small-calibre turrets and ornaments.

traits.locale_text: Im Laufe der folgenden Jahrhunderte wurde diese effiziente Archäotech-Artillerie durch kleinkalibrige Geschütze und Ornamente ersetzt.

languages.text: 在之后的几个世纪里，这种威力强大的远古科技火炮已被小口径炮台和装饰物所取代。
languages.original_text: Over the centuries that followed, this powerful archeotech artillery was replaced by small-calibre turrets and ornaments.

traits.locale_text: 在之后的几个世纪里，这种威力强大的远古科技火炮已被小口径炮台和装饰物所取代。

languages.text: Au cours des siècles suivants, ces puissantes pièces d'artillerie archéotechnologiques furent remplacées par des ornements et des tourelles de petit calibre.
languages.original_text: Over the centuries that followed, this powerful archeotech artillery was replaced by small-calibre turrets and ornaments.

traits.locale_text: Au cours des siècles suivants, ces puissantes pièces d'artillerie archéotechnologiques furent remplacées par des ornements et des tourelles de petit calibre.

languages.text: En los siglos siguientes, esta potente pieza arqueotecnológica de artillería fue reemplazada por torretas de pequeño calibre y ornamentos varios.
languages.original_text: Over the centuries that followed, this powerful archeotech artillery was replaced by small-calibre turrets and ornaments.

traits.locale_text: En los siglos siguientes, esta potente pieza arqueotecnológica de artillería fue reemplazada por torretas de pequeño calibre y ornamentos varios.

languages.text: İlerleyen yüzyıllarda bu güçlü arkeotek topçularının yerini küçük kalibreli taret ve süslemeler aldı.
languages.original_text: Over the centuries that followed, this powerful archeotech artillery was replaced by small-calibre turrets and ornaments.

traits.locale_text: İlerleyen yüzyıllarda bu güçlü arkeotek topçularının yerini küçük kalibreli taret ve süslemeler aldı.

languages.text: その後の何世紀にもわたって、この強力なアーケオテクノロジーの砲台は、小口径の砲塔や装飾品に置き換えられました。
languages.original_text: Over the centuries that followed, this powerful archeotech artillery was replaced by small-calibre turrets and ornaments.

traits.locale_text: その後の何世紀にもわたって、この強力なアーケオテクノロジーの砲台は、小口径の砲塔や装飾品に置き換えられました。
